source_quote: during the study, 10 patients were excluded. These patients include 4 patients in the selenium group (3 patients due to death and 1 due to kidney transplantation) and 6 patients in the placebo group (4 patients due to death, 1 due to kidney transplantation and 1 due to lower extremity fractures)
Allocated to supplemented group (n=43) ... Excluded (n=26) ... Death (n=2) ... Allocated to placebo group (n=34) ... Excluded (n=14) ... Death (n=1)
At 9 months into the one-year study period, one patient in the placebo group died from abdominal sepsis.
there was no statistical difference between the propolis and placebo groups in terms of the eGFR - 37 ml/min per 1.73m2 (95% CI, 30 to 44) vs. 33 ml/min per 1.73m2 (95% CI, 27 to 39); P= 0.40
